tools.name: get_ip
tools.description: The caller's public IP address and version (4 or 6).

tools.name: get_asn
tools.description: The caller's network ASN and organization, as seen by Cloudflare.

tools.name: get_headers
tools.description: The caller's HTTP request headers, echoed back (proxy and Cloudflare headers filtered out).

tools.name: get_location
tools.description: Approximate geolocation of the caller's IP: city, region, country, coordinates, continent and EU flag.

tools.name: get_security
tools.description: The caller's connection security: TLS version/cipher, HTTP protocol, TCP RTT and bot-detection signals.

tools.name: get_timezone
tools.description: The IANA timezone of the caller's IP.

tools.name: get_whereami
tools.description: The caller's coordinates (lat/lng) with an accuracy radius in metres; Mozilla Location Service-compatible.
